changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'url-encode', 'URL 编码', '将文本按 URL 规则进行编码，适合处理查询参数、回调地址和重定向场景。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入任意文本
- 点击执行后返回 `encodeURIComponent` 结果
- 适用于查询参数、回调地址或前端跳转链接处理', 'encoding', 'code', '["URL","编码"]', 40, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'url-encode', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"输入文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":20000,"placeholder":"请输入需要 URL 编码的文本"}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"displayMode":"text","primaryField":"text","copyable":true,"rows":8}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'url-encode' );
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'url-decode', 'URL 解码', '将 URL 编码字符串还原为原始文本，便于排查参数串和跳转链接。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入经过 URL 编码的字符串
- 点击执行后返回解码结果
- 如果输入不是合法的编码串，前端会直接提示错误', 'encoding', 'unlock', '["URL","解码"]', 50, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'url-decode', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"URL 文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":20000,"placeholder":"请输入需要 URL 解码的文本"}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"displayMode":"text","primaryField":"text","copyable":true,"rows":8}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'url-decode' );
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'sha256-digest', 'SHA-256 摘要', '在浏览器本地计算 SHA-256 摘要，适合做内容指纹校验和联调比对。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入任意文本
- 点击执行后返回 SHA-256 十六进制摘要
- 该工具在浏览器本地执行，不会把文本发送到后端', 'hash', 'safety', '["摘要","SHA-256"]', 60, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'sha256-digest', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"输入文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":20000,"placeholder":"请输入需要计算摘要的文本"}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"displayMode":"text","primaryField":"digest","copyable":true,"rows":8}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'sha256-digest' );
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'json-format', 'JSON 格式化', '将一段 JSON 文本格式化为易读的缩进结构，适合调试接口返回和配置文件。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入合法 JSON 文本
- 点击执行后返回格式化后的结果
- 非法 JSON 会在前端直接提示，便于快速修正', 'json', 'tool', '["JSON","格式化"]', 70, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'json-format', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"JSON 文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":50000,"placeholder":"请输入需要格式化的 JSON 文本","rows":10}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"displayMode":"text","primaryField":"text","copyable":true,"rows":12}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'json-format' );
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'json-minify', 'JSON 压缩', '将 JSON 文本压缩为单行结构，适合传参、存档和快速复制。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入合法 JSON 文本
- 点击执行后返回压缩后的单行 JSON
- 非法 JSON 会在前端直接提示', 'json', 'tool', '["JSON","压缩"]', 80, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'json-minify', '{"fields":[{"name":"text","label":"JSON 文本","type":"textarea","required":true,"maxLength":50000,"placeholder":"请输入需要压缩的 JSON 文本","rows":10}]}', '{"text":""}', '{"displayMode":"text","primaryField":"text","copyable":true,"rows":8}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'json-minify' );
INSERT INTO app_tool_definition ( code, name, summary, description_markdown, category_code, icon_key, tags_json, display_order, enabled, execution_mode, renderer_code, handler_code, input_schema_json, default_values_json, result_schema_json, server_config_json, timeout_ms, rate_limit_scope, rate_limit_max_requests, rate_limit_window_seconds, audit_enabled, payload_limit_bytes ) SELECT 'timestamp-convert', '时间戳转换', '在时间戳和日期时间字符串之间快速转换，适合排查日志时间和接口字段。', E'## 使用说明

- 输入时间戳或日期时间文本
- 选择转换方向与时间单位
- 点击执行后返回转换结果，便于日志排查与接口联调', 'time', 'tool', '["时间","时间戳"]', 90, TRUE, 'CLIENT', 'text-workbench', 'timestamp-convert', '{"fields":[{"name":"value","label":"输入值","type":"text","required":true,"maxLength":128,"placeholder":"例如 1710489600 或 2026-03-16 12:30:00"},{"name":"mode","label":"转换方向","type":"select","required":true,"options":[{"label":"时间戳 -> 日期时间","value":"timestamp-to-datetime"},{"label":"日期时间 -> 时间戳","value":"datetime-to-timestamp"}],"defaultValue":"timestamp-to-datetime"},{"name":"unit","label":"时间单位","type":"select","required":true,"options":[{"label":"毫秒","value":"milliseconds"},{"label":"秒","value":"seconds"}],"defaultValue":"milliseconds"}]}', '{"value":"","mode":"timestamp-to-datetime","unit":"milliseconds"}', '{"displayMode":"text","primaryField":"text","copyable":true,"rows":8}', '{}', NULL, 'NONE', NULL, NULL, FALSE, 65536 WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_tool_definition WHERE code = 'timestamp-convert' );
